title: astragalus vicia
intro: Astragalus vicia, also known as the milk vetch or vetch pea, is a perennial plant species within the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus vicia include enhancing the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas for enhanced therapeutic effects.
